rulings.Case Title: THEODORE ROHNING et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 29, 2007, LINE 7. DEFENDANT DURO DYNE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROPOUND "STATE ALL FACTS/WITNESSES" DISCOVERY. HEIRS' TESTIMONY IS NOT SUFFICIENT TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT FAILS TO PRESENT EVIDENCE THAT EXPOSURE TO DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT WAS NOT A SUBSTANTIAL FACTOR. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION FAILS BECAUSE IT RELIES ON A LACK OF EXPOSURE WHICH HAS NOT BEEN ESTABLISHED. ROHNING AND COHEN DECLARATIONS ARE ADMISSIBLE AND CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: BERTA R. CARTER VS. LIONEL SIRIAS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Court Enforcement Of Stipulated Settlement And Ntc To Appear
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 29, 2007, LINE 8. PLAINTIFF BERTA CARTER'S MOTION For Court Enforcement Of Stipulated Settlement IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO EXECUTE A GRANT DEED CONVEYING THE REAL PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF ON OR BEFORE APRIL 6, 2007. JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR THE OUTSTANDING BALANCE OF THE MORTGAGE PLUS $100.00 PER DAY FROM MAY 31, 2006 TO DATE. THE COURT SHALL RETAIN JURISDICTION TO MONITOR DEFENDANT'S PAYMENTS OF THE JUDGMENT AND THE MORTGAGE. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST THAT DEFENDANT APPEAR AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IS DENIED. =(302/PJM/LT)

rulings.Case Title: MICHELLE MORALES et al VS. CLUB ONE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Defendant Club One, Inc.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 29, 2007, LINE 16. DEFENDANT CLUB ONE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS IS DENIED, VICTORIA V SUPERIOR COURT IS PERSUASIVE AUTHORITY. IN ADDITION, IT CANNOT BE DETERMINED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSENTED TO THE PROVISION. THE PROVISION IS NOT HIGHLIGHTED, THE BOX FOR PLAINTIFF'S INITIALS ON PAGE TWO IS BLANK AND THE RULES OF THE AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION ARE NOT DISCLOSED. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: MONETARY MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. MANTA VENTURES LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Prosecute (Ccp 583.410) By Failing To Bring Matter To Trial Within Two Years From The Date Of Filing
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 29, 2007, LINE 17. DEFENDANT MANTA VENTURES, L.L.C.'S Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Prosecute (C.C.P SECTION 583.410) By Failing To Bring Matter To Trial Within Two Years From The Date Of Filing IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION DEMONSTRATES SEVERAL GOOD FAITH REASONS WHY THE CASE HAS NOT GONE TO TRIAL. MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO MEET THE REQUIREMENT OF C.C.P. SECTION 128.7. =(302/PJM/PB)
